'''fabuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanomethyl|cyanomethyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanomethyl|cyanomethyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fabuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæbizith|fæbizith]] || [[word:fæbizij|fæbizij]] || [[word:fæbizish|fæbizish]] || [[word:fæbizi|fæbizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabubuzuth|fabubuzuth]] || [[word:fabubuzuj|fabubuzuj]] || [[word:fabubuzush|fabubuzush]] || [[word:fabubuzu|fabubuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabuzuth|fabuzuth]] || [[word:fabuzuj|fabuzuj]] || [[word:fabuzush|fabuzush]] || [[word:fabuzu|fabuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabufzuth|fabufzuth]] || [[word:fabufzuj|fabufzuj]] || [[word:fabufzush|fabufzush]] || [[word:fabufzuf|fabufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fabuzuthu|fabuzuthu]] || [[word:fabuzuju|fabuzuju]] || [[word:fabuzushu|fabuzushu]] || [[word:fabuzuku|fabuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fabuzuth|fabuzuth]] || [[word:fabuzuj|fabuzuj]] || [[word:fabuzush|fabuzush]] || [[word:fabuzu|fabuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fabuzuthul|fabuzuthul]] || [[word:fabuzujul|fabuzujul]] || [[word:fabuzushul|fabuzushul]] || [[word:fabuzukul|fabuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fabuzuthuthu|fabuzuthuthu]] || [[word:fabuzujuju|fabuzujuju]] || [[word:fabuzushushu|fabuzushushu]] || [[word:fabuzuku|fabuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fabuzuthun|fabuzuthun]] || [[word:fabuzujun|fabuzujun]] || [[word:fabuzushun|fabuzushun]] || [[word:fabuzukun|fabuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fabuzuthuoro|fabuzuthuoro]] || [[word:fabuzujuoro|fabuzujuoro]] || [[word:fabuzushuoro|fabuzushuoro]] || [[word:fabuzukuoro|fabuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
